events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate scenario: crew used field method for conductor selection & sizing less tidy than preferred shop approach but matches listed product instructions and project requirement. No local amendment or drawing note forbids it. Reference NEC 310 Table 310.16. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since method matches product instructions and project requirements, no code violation, no local amendment forbids. Work in-progress. Risk low. Decision pass. Need fill fields. Component conditions none flagged -> empty list. percent_complete maybe 50? value? Not asked numeric reading; value 0 default. sound_source etc default empty string? Schema says string. Use "" or null? It says string. Use empty string. confidence high 0.95. event_time 0.0 rate 0.0 order empty list. workable empty list. findings empty list. actions maybe none. rationale brief. references NEC 310.16. Ensure valid JSON.
